subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Thy two sealed letters - one dated the twenty-second of Dhi'l-Qá'dih and the other the twenty-fifth - have been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق روحانی دو طغرا مکتوب شما یکی بیست و دویم ذی القعده و دیگری ۲۵
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation
